meta.title: CANCEL Your AI Video Generator! Freepik AI + Google VEO2 Does it ALL
meta.description:
Is Google VEO 2 in Freepik AI is the Best AI Video Generator?
Try Google Veo 2 in Freepik AI - https://bit.ly/Freepikai
20% discount code (annual plan)  - DANKIEFT

In this Freepik AI tutorial I walk you through Google Veo 2. This new AI video 
generator is one of the best in terms of quality. But it is also the most expensive one. That's why I'm walking you through how to use google veo2, how to create the tiny workers videos and how to make cinematic ai videos all using Freepik AI.

My prompt templates
CGI prompts -  https://docs.google.com/document/d/1IU-AZBBfiJgeVfreW2SssPyVUdItpYpW61nhtOn7sJw/edit?usp=sharing
Tiny worker prompts - https://docs.google.com/document/d/1N3MLSczZbB3L1wt6U-ubFGdKdpm__hRpcw3ITzgxi7M/edit?usp=drive_link



👉My Ai Toolkit - https://dankieft.carrd.co/
My toolkit gives you over 30+ ai tools that I've gathered over the years and use daily. You'll also get access to my free newsletter that educates you about the latest ai tools.

📧 For business inquiries: business@dankieft.com
Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dan.kieft/
